items.title: Terminal agent multiplexer for workflows
items.oneliner: Terminal multiplexer for running and switching between multiple AI agents without leaving your shell.

items.title: AirPods features on Linux
items.oneliner: Reverse-engineered toolkit brings AirPods battery, ear detection, and noise controls to Linux and Android.

items.title: Lightweight desktop teleprompter in Python
items.oneliner: PySide6 teleprompter app adds always-on-top scrolling scripts, hotkeys, and file auto-reload for recordings.

items.title: Zero-downtime Kubernetes cluster federation guide
items.oneliner: Hands-on Linkerd guide shows three multicluster federation patterns for failover and cross-region service continuity.

items.title: SerenityOS on old ThinkPads
items.oneliner: Step-by-step install notes show how to boot SerenityOS on a ThinkPad T60 and fix kernel panic issues.

items.title: Run speculative decoding locally
items.oneliner: Tutorial shows how to run DeepSeek DSpark on Qwen3 locally and reproduce 60 to 85 percent speedups.

items.title: Cybersecurity model benchmark comparison
items.oneliner: Benchmark compares GLM 5.2 against Claude on security tasks, helping teams choose stronger coding and analysis models.

items.title: VictoriaLogs columnar storage internals
items.oneliner: Deep internals walkthrough explains compressed columnar log storage for faster queries and lower I O costs.

items.title: Rust assertions with cleaner diagnostics
items.oneliner: New Rust test assertion library simplifies matcher syntax and improves failure diagnostics over GoogleTest Rust.

items.title: NUMA performance explained clearly
items.oneliner: Practical NUMA guide explains why identical VMs perform differently and how memory locality changes latency.
